TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ma‚Äôolaway, title = Ma‚Äôolaway, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ma‚Äôolaway} }

S.FORM: Ma'olaway Itiniay i Donghe Cen no Taitung ko Ma'olaway a niyaro', 135 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 319 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 31% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 100 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 69% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 219 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 27%, Bunun 1%, roma 3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ma °o~u…ĺawaj itiniaj i …¨~…ģo~uŇčńß…ô ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u ma °o~u…ĺawaj a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Ma'olaway Itiniay i Donghe Cen no Taitung ko Ma'olaway a niyaro', 135 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 319 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 31% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 100 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 69% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 219 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 27%, Bunun 1%, roma 3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ma °o~u…ĺawaj itiniaj i …¨~…ģo~uŇčńß…ô ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u ma °o~u…ĺawaj a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
